elements.original_description: A white piggy bank with coins dropping into it automatically, surrounded by green dollar signs. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality professional photograph of a clean white ceramic piggy bank on a white surface. Golden coins are being dropped automatically into the coin slot from above, creating a slight motion blur to indicate movement. Several stylized, glowing green dollar signs float in the air around the piggy bank. Cinematic lighting with a soft, clean key light and a bright, minimalist studio background. Sharp focus on the piggy bank and coins. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A hand placing a checklist on a white table, with a green checkmark appearing. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-resolution photograph from a top-down angle. A human hand in frame, placing a white paper checklist onto a pristine white wooden table. A bright, vibrant green checkmark symbol is appearing as if being drawn or stamped onto the checklist, with a subtle glow or sparkle effect. Natural, soft window lighting creates gentle shadows. Clean, minimalist composition. Sharp focus on the checklist and hand. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A calendar on a white wall with a red arrow pointing to a specific date. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional high-resolution photograph of a blank, generic monthly paper calendar pinned to a clean white wall. A bold, shiny red 3D arrow sticker or magnet is pointing decisively at a specific, unlabeled square on the calendar grid. Bright, even studio lighting eliminates harsh shadows. Minimalist aesthetic with a shallow depth of field, slightly blurring the wall. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks on the calendar or arrow.
